_doc: Advisories listed here will NOT fail the dependency-audit job until their `expires` date.
After `expires` (UTC, YYYY-MM-DD), the entry is treated as inactive and the gate fails again.
An entry matches when its `id` equals any of the advisory's ruleId, GHSA id, or one of its CVE ids.
All fields except `id` and `expires` are documentation only.
Audit JSON parsing and matching live in .github/workflows/scripts/apply-allowlist.mjs.

entries.reason: Project is pinned to react-router 6.30.1 (latest v6 patch); upstream fix is only in 7.x. Upgrade to v7 is intentionally deferred per project policy (see mem://architecture/dependency-pinning). Redirect surface is reviewed; no untrusted external redirects in app routes.

Project is pinned to react-router 6.30.1 (latest v6 patch); upstream fix is only in 7.x. Upgrade to v7 is intentionally deferred per project policy (see mem://architecture/dependency-pinning). No same-origin redirects accept user-controlled paths starting with //.

Open redirect via backslash in <Link>/useNavigate (CVE-2025-68470 bypass). Fixed only in react-router 7.18.0+. Project is pinned to react-router v6 per mem://architecture/dependency-pinning; upgrade to v7 is intentionally deferred. App routes do not accept user-controlled redirect targets in <Link> or useNavigate; social OAuth redirect_uri is constrained to same-origin literals per project policy.

Arbitrary Constructor Injection via deserializeErrors() in React Router SSR Hydration. Fixed only in react-router 7.18.0+. Project is pinned to react-router v6 per mem://architecture/dependency-pinning; upgrade to v7 is intentionally deferred. Project is a Vite SPA and does not use React Router SSR hydration, so the vulnerable code path is unreachable at runtime.
Advisory affects postcss < 8.4.31. Project installs postcss 8.5.12+ (override), so the runtime is not vulnerable. Allowlisted to silence a stale advisory match from the audit database.
